items.claim: Robert Whittaker utilizes a high volume of straight punches in his striking combinations.
items.quote: Robert Whittaker does have a lot of straight shots.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov is susceptible to being hit by straight punches.
items.quote: Krylov gets hit with a lot of straight shots.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker's movement is characterized by being very light on his toes.
Nikita Krylov has a history of being finished by straight punches and subsequent ground strikes.
items.quote: he got hit with a straight left to ground punches with Bogdan Guskov.
